name: portfolio-micro-frontend
description: Individual portfolio website built with React micro frontends (Module Federation)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shell,header,about,experience,projects,contact -c blue,green,yellow,red,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w shell" "npm run dev -w @portfolio/header" "npm run dev -w @portfolio/about" "npm run dev -w @portfolio/experience" "npm run dev -w @portfolio/projects" "npm run dev -w @portfolio/contact"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @portfolio/header && npm run build -w @portfolio/about && npm run build -w @portfolio/experience && npm run build -w @portfolio/projects && npm run build -w @portfolio/contact && npm run build -w shell
